must: Contact form submissions must send JSON to /api/contact/resend in the generated site.
The server route must validate name, email, and message before any provider request.
Missing RESEND_API_KEY must return an honest design-mode no-op response without calling the provider.
Client code must never contain provider secrets and may only call the local server route.
avoid: Hardcoded API keys, placeholder secrets, or env value leaks in client code.
Design-mode responses that claim the message was sent.
